sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95327" key="skultiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκυλτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n95327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vexatious</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:236:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">236.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
